input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.4
            TITLE: location

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.4: Location
T.7.4 Location  
Any part of any Aerodynamic Device or Bodywork must meet V.1.1 and V.1.4.1

final_answer: rule T.7.4: Location T.7.4 Location Any part of any Aerodynamic Device or Bodywork must meet V.1.1 and V.1.4.1
